<includeonly>Spec {{{section}}}{{#if:{{{paragraph|}}}|, §{{{paragraph}}}}}{{#if:{{{title|}}}| — {{{title}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Cite spec|section=03 30 00|paragraph=2.1.A|title=Cast-in-Place Concrete}}</nowiki></code>

Renders as: Spec 03 30 00, §2.1.A — Cast-in-Place Concrete

=== Parameters ===
* '''section''' (required): CSI section number
* '''paragraph''' (required): Paragraph or subparagraph number (e.g. 2.1.A, 3.5.2.b)
* '''title''' (optional): Section title

[[Category:Citation templates]]
</noinclude>
